global_attributes.title: PROBA-V L2A Top-of-Canopy Reflectance with Uncertainty
global_attributes.source: SMAC atmospheric correction with MERRA-2 reanalysis
global_attributes.comment: Surface reflectance product with propagated uncertainties

rTOA.long_name: Top of Atmosphere Bidirectional Reflectance Factor
rTOA.comment: TOA reflectance for PROBA-V bands (Blue, Red, NIR, SWIR)

rTOC.long_name: Top of Canopy Bidirectional Reflectance Factor

UrTOC.comment: Total propagated uncertainty in TOC reflectance

Drsurf.comment: Random uncertainty component of surface reflectance

Jrtoa.long_name: Jacobian of TOC reflectance with respect to TOA reflectance
Jrtoa.comment: ∂ρTOC/∂ρTOA - Sensitivity of surface reflectance to TOA reflectance

Juo3.long_name: Jacobian of TOC reflectance with respect to ozone
Juo3.comment: ∂ρTOC/∂O3 - Sensitivity of surface reflectance to ozone column

Juh2o.long_name: Jacobian of TOC reflectance with respect to water vapor
Juh2o.comment: ∂ρTOC/∂H2O - Sensitivity of surface reflectance to water vapor column

Jpre.long_name: Jacobian of TOC reflectance with respect to pressure
Jpre.comment: ∂ρTOC/∂P - Sensitivity of surface reflectance to atmospheric pressure

SZA.comment: Angle between sun and local vertical

SAA.comment: Azimuth angle of sun measured clockwise from north

VZA.comment: Viewing zenith angle for VNIR bands

VZA_IR.comment: Viewing zenith angle for SWIR bands

VAA.comment: Viewing azimuth angle for VNIR bands

VAA_IR.comment: Viewing azimuth angle for SWIR bands

TOTEXTTAU.comment: Total aerosol extinction optical thickness from MERRA-2

TQV.comment: Vertically integrated water vapor from MERRA-2

SLP.comment: Mean sea level pressure from MERRA-2

T10M.comment: Air temperature at 10m height from MERRA-2

elev.comment: Digital elevation model height above geoid

err_slope.comment: Error due to terrain slope effects on atmospheric path

ac_flag.comment: Quality flag for atmospheric correction processing

ac_process_flag.comment: Processing status flag for atmospheric correction

SM_MAP.flag_meanings: cloud_state surface_type swir_validity nir_validity red_validity blue_validity swir_coverage nir_coverage red_coverage blue_coverage
SM_MAP.comment: Per-pixel status map with bitwise encoding. Bits 0-2 (cloud_state): 0=clear, 1=shadow, 2=undefined, 3=cloud, 4=ice/snow. Bit 3 (surface_type): 0=sea, 1=land. Bits 4-11 (band validity/coverage): 0=bad/no coverage, 1=good/coverage. Extract with: cloud_state=(SM_MAP>>0)&0x7, surface_type=(SM_MAP>>3)&0x1, etc.

Duh2o.comment: Propagated uncertainty from water vapor: |J_h2o| × σ_h2o
